items.title: Is the new Premier League ball behind all the long-range goals? We asked a scientist
items.summary: Teams aren't taking as many long-range shots this season, but they're still scoring stunning goals from distance. Is a change in the Premier League match ball responsible?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Bills won't close the door on Tre'Davious White's return
items.summary: Cornerback Tre'Davious White remains a free agent, but he could still wind up back where he played in 2025.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Siddle, Samit blocked from Blast after playing in 'disappoved' veterans league
items.summary: Both men featured in Goa tournament for retired players that is unsanctioned by BCCI
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
